headline: UBS Just Hiked Delta Air Lines Price Target to $95: Premium Cabin Strategy Targets $13 EPS
summary: UBS just turned more bullish on one of the airline industry’s premium-strategy poster children. The firm raised its price target on Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) stock to $95 from $86 and reiterated a Buy rating, pointing to a margin and earnings trajectory that looks structurally different from past airline cycles. headline: America’s Tungsten Wake-Up Call: Guardian Metal Resources Targets a Critical Supply Chain Gap
summary: For years, tungsten has operated quietly in the background of the global economy, essential to defense systems, aerospace engineering, industrial manufacturing, and advanced technologies, yet rarely discussed outside specialist circles. That is changing fast.
